explanation: The "UI + API Gateway" appears to combine multiple concerns in a single component: serving static UI resources, handling client REST entry, service routing/load-balancing orchestration, and central integration with several backend services. This concentration of responsibilities and fan-out dependency pattern suggests a likely Microservice Greedy tendency (gateway becoming a mini-monolith/bottleneck). Other domain services (customers, genai, vets, pets) look more focused, each with its own datastore, so the smell is mainly centered on the gateway component.
